title: Schematic Company
description: A company (customer organization) record in Schematic, representing a billable entity with features, plans, and entitlements.

keys.description: External system keys used to identify the company (e.g., Stripe customer ID, Salesforce account ID).

traits.description: Custom metadata attributes for the company.

plan.description: The active subscription plan for the company.

entityTraits.description: Trait values associated with this company.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the company was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the company was last updated.

lastSeenAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent activity for this company.

userCount.description: Number of users associated with this company.
